channel.title: GitHub CMake Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of CMake in GitHub

item.title: TheLartians/ModernCppStarter
item.description: 🚀 Kick-start your C++! A template for modern C++ projects using CMake, CI, code coverage, clang-format, reproducible dependency management and much more.

item.title: microsoft/vcpkg
item.description: C++ Library Manager for Windows, Linux, and MacOS

item.title: PX4/px4_msgs
item.description: ROS/ROS2 messages that match the uORB messages counterparts on the PX4 Firmware

item.title: vector-of-bool/cmrc
item.description: A Resource Compiler in a Single CMake Script

item.title: leetal/ios-cmake
item.description: A CMake toolchain file for iOS/iPadOS, visionOS, macOS, watchOS & tvOS C/C++/Obj-C++ development

item.title: flathub/shared-modules
item.description: Common Flatpak modules that can be used as a git submodule

item.title: KDAB/KDSingleApplication
item.description: KDAB's helper class for single-instance policy applications

item.title: ament/ament_cmake
item.description: Supporting CMake packages for working with ament
